title: Prompt Engineering
desc: Everyone learned to talk to AI. Crafting effective prompts became the defining skill of the ChatGPT era.

title: LLM Agents
desc: AI began acting autonomously — browsing, coding, and executing multi-step plans without human intervention.

title: Agentic Coding
desc: AI coding agents shipped real code. Devin, Cursor, and Claude Code turned autonomous programming into a product.

title: MCP
desc: Model Context Protocol gave AI a universal connector to tools and data — the "USB-C of AI."

title: Vibe Coding
desc: "Fully give in to the vibes, forget that the code even exists." A cultural shift in how developers relate to code.

title: Context Engineering
desc: From writing prompts to designing information architecture. The art of filling the context window with just the right information.

title: Harness Engineering
desc: Agent = Model + Harness. Building the systems around models that make AI agents reliable in production.
